title: Get Help
meta_description: A resource finder for mental health support: crisis lines plus a searchable directory of hotlines, therapy, and community services by topic, location, and language.

crisis.heading: Need help right now?
crisis.intro: If you or someone you know is in crisis or thinking about suicide, reach a trained counselor any time. These lines are free, confidential, and open around the clock.
crisis.not_us_before: Not in the US? Find a helpline in your country at

directory.heading: Find a resource
directory.intro: Browse 491 vetted organizations for mental health support. Search by name, then narrow by topic, location, or language. Every listing links out to the organization providing the care.
